title: GuardrailRelativeValue
content:
# GuardrailRelativeValue

Rate of change limit definition


## Properties

- **value** (`number`): The limiting rate of change value.
- **inclusive** (`boolean`): The defined limiting rate of change value is inclusive within the allowable range.
- **type** (`string`): Limiting rate of change value is an absolute value or a percentage of the current value before the control change.

value.description: The limiting rate of change value.

inclusive.description: The defined limiting rate of change value is inclusive within the allowable range.

type.description: Limiting rate of change value is an absolute value or a percentage of the current value before the control change.
